title: Fed's Barr backs stablecoin clarity but warns of run risks
message_html: Fed's Barr backs stablecoin clarity but warns of run risks ...
snippet: US Fed Governor Michael Barr said clearer US rules could help the market grow, but warned that GENIUS Act implementation must still guard against runs, weak reserves and illicit finance.

title: Crypto super PAC names Tether exec chairman as stablecoin debate in D.C. intensifies
message_html: Crypto super PAC names Tether exec chairman as stablecoin debate in D.C. intensifies ...
snippet: The debate over stablecoin rewards seems to be the final stumbling block to Congress passing the Clarity Act.

title: Naoris launches post-quantum blockchain as quantum security risks gain attention
message_html: Naoris launches post-quantum blockchain as quantum security risks gain attention ...
snippet: Naoris Protocol has launched a post-quantum layer-1 blockchain designed to protect transactions against future cryptographic vulnerabilities.
